ham.subject: Your AcmeCloud Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Jane Doe,

We hope you are enjoying the features of AcmeCloud. This is a reminder that your subscription will automatically renew on 15 May 2026. To continue uninterrupted service, please review your renewal details and confirm your payment method by clicking the link below.

<URL>

If you have any questions, contact our support team at support@acmec.com.

Thank you for choosing AcmeCloud.

Best regards,
AcmeCloud Billing Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Scholarship Award Confirmation Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear John Smith,

Congratulations! Your application for the Global Scholars Scholarship has been selected. To secure your award of $5,000, please verify your personal details and submit the required documents by 10 April 2026.

Please click the link below to complete the verification process:
<URL>

Failure to complete this step will result in forfeiture of the scholarship.

Sincerely,
Office of Student Financial Aid
University of Excellence
